# RYUOLOGY

> RYUOLOGY is a generative-engine optimization (GEO) studio based in Bangkok. We structure brands so AI answer engines — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google Gemini & AI Overviews, Microsoft Copilot, Claude and Grok — cite them as the source inside generated answers. We combine three layers: SEO (foundation), AEO (structure) and GEO (retrieval).

## Definitions

- **GEO (Generative Engine Optimization):** Structuring content and data so generative AI models retrieve, trust and cite a brand inside their generated answers.
- **AEO (Answer Engine Optimization):** Optimizing content to be the single best answer — targeting featured snippets, voice answers and Google AI Overviews via Q&A structure and FAQ schema.
- **SEO (Search Engine Optimization):** Technical and content optimization for organic ranking on Google and Bing, which still feed the models.

## Services

- [Services overview](https://ryuology.studio/#pillars): SEO, AEO and GEO explained.
- [Method](https://ryuology.studio/#process): 4 phases — Audit, Structure, Optimize, Monitor.
- [FAQ](https://ryuology.studio/#faq): Machine-readable answers about GEO, AEO and citation tracking.

## The Journal (Lifestyle Blog)

RYUOLOGY publishes a lifestyle blog called "The Journal" covering food, travel, health, and style.

- [The Journal](https://ryuology.studio/blog/): Lifestyle content — Food, Travel, Health, Style.
- [Morning Routine That Changed Everything](https://ryuology.studio/blog/post.html): How a simple 5-step morning routine improves focus, energy and daily direction. Category: Health.

## Key facts

- Founded: 2024. Location: Bangkok, Thailand. Serves clients worldwide.
- Engines optimized for: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, AI Overviews, Copilot, Claude, Grok, Google, Bing.
- Blog topics: Food, Travel, Health, Style (Thai-language lifestyle content).
- Contact: hello@ryuology.studio
